planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 now tests multi-step candidate rollout before projecting visible trajectory through a stance WBC guard.

perspectives.product: combines exp80 visible geometry direction with exp82 stance guard instead of choosing one
perspectives.architecture: monkeypatches exp67 WBC-lite candidate selection with horizon rollout scoring
perspectives.security: no credentials or external side effects
perspectives.qa: native sweep records raw JSON and visible gate metrics per horizon variant
perspectives.skeptic: constant-force multi-step projection may still overconstrain the model and lose visible depth

dod: raw native JSON per horizon variant
summary states whether any variant passes visible_8cm_gate

sources.note: Humanoid squat uses trajectory optimization followed by WBC tracking.
Centroidal online trajectory generation motivates short preview control under multi-contact constraints.
Strict contact force constraints motivate filtering motion tracking through contact feasibility.
